The new budgets take effect immediately.

dlg.dlg_banner_hint: Adjustments are suggested based on historical data.
dlg.dlg_check_info: All budget categories for the selected month are checked (threshold: 100%). Rules can be configured under Settings → Budget Warnings.
dlg.dlg_urgent_check: A systematic budget review is strongly recommended.
dlg.dlg_structural_changes: Consider whether structural changes are needed.
dlg.datenbank_reset_wirklich: Really reset? All data will be lost!
dlg.restore_key_intro:
Your Restore Key

This key can save your data if you forget your password/PIN.
It is shown ONLY ONCE!
dlg.restore_key_copy_note:
📋 Write it down or copy it now!
Without the restore key and without your password/PIN, your data is permanently lost.
dlg.backup_includes_users: This backup contains user account data (users.json).
dlg.restore_users_question:
This backup contains user account data (users.json).

Do you want to restore the user accounts as well?

(Recommended for fresh installs or new devices)

Would you like a quick guided first-time setup?

setup.setup_db_desc: BudgetManager stores everything locally in a SQLite database.

tip.carryover_start_month: From which month should the carryover be accumulated?
tip.carryover_start_year: From which year should the carryover be accumulated?
tip.categories_tab_expert: Enables the separate Categories tab for advanced category management.
tip.sync_tracking: Synchronize current status with tracking entries.
tip.due_day: On which day of the month is this expense due?
tip.bo_filter_deviations: Deviations only: Only categories with surplus or deficit
tip.carryover_explain: Carryover (cum.) = cumulative remainder from {from_month} {from_year} up to and including last month. Remainder = (Budget + Carryover) − Booked.
tip.carryover_short: Carryover (cum.) = cumulative remainder up to last month.

overview.carry_explain: Carryover (cum.) = cumulated remainder since {month} {year} up to previous month. Remaining = (Budget + Carryover) − Actual. Next carryover = Remaining, carried to the following month.
overview.carry_explain_short: Carryover (cum.) = cumulated remainder up to previous month. Remaining = (Budget + Carryover) − Actual. Next carryover = Remaining.
overview.title: 📊 Overview

tip.bo_filter:
All: Shows all budgeted categories
Only deviations: Only categories with surplus or deficit

overview.summary: {typ} – {month} {year}: {n} categories · {deficit} deficit / {surplus} surplus / {balanced} balanced

savings.empty: No savings goals yet. Click ‹Manage› to get started.

overview.no_suggestions:
✓ No adjustment suggestions for {year}/{month}.

All categories are within budget tolerance.
overview.categories_outside_plan: There are categories outside the plan.
overview.tip_budget_warnings: Tip: For historical analysis and budget suggestions: Extras → Check budget warnings.

favorites.header_html:
⭐ Favorites Overview

Shows budget vs. spending for your favorited categories ({month} {year})

manage.title: Manage favorites
manage.body:
Favorites can be managed in the Budget tab via the context menu:

• Right-click category → 'Mark as favorite'
• Right-click favorite → 'Remove favorite'

Favorites are shown at the top of this dashboard.

tip.quick_add: Quickly add a new tracking entry (Ctrl+N)
tip.overview: Quick overview for the selected year/type (year total and monthly average).

chk.ask_due: Ask for due day while typing

msg.select_month_cell: Please select a month cell (Jan–Dec) you want to edit.
msg.select_category_row: Please select a category row (not TOTAL/header).
msg.copy_year_diff: Source year and target year must be different.
msg.delete_global_warn_1: WARNING: This removes the category globally and deletes all budget entries
msg.no_value_to_copy: No value found to copy. Please fill a month first.
msg.edit_buffer_help: Edit the own amount (buffer) in the month cells.
msg.edit_buffer_help_short: Edit the buffer directly in the month cell (enter a number).
msg.remove_row_confirm: Delete budget row '{category}' for {typ} in year {year}?
msg.remove_row_confirm_short:
Remove budget row for '{category}' in year {year}?

The category remains; only budget values will be deleted.
msg.delete_category_warning: ⚠️ WARNING: This also deletes all budget entries in ALL years!
msg.delete_category_also_sub: The following subcategories will also be deleted:
msg.parent_has_children:
This category has subcategories.

Month values are the sum (children + buffer).
msg.total_parent_readonly: Total is read-only for parent categories.
msg.no_categories_create_main: There are no categories yet. Please create a main category first.

tip.unlock_goal_1: Tip: Unlock the goal first (Overview → Goals → Unlock),
tip.unlock_goal_3: The booking will still be performed.
tip.set_budget_and_mark_fix: Tip: Set an amount in the budget and mark the category as fixed cost or recurring.

msg.no_tags:
No tags created yet.
You can create tags via 'Extras → Manage tags'.
msg.already_booked: Everything for this month is already booked.
msg.show_list_prompt: Show a list to select from?
msg.no_fix_or_recurring: No fixed/recurring categories with a budget amount found.
msg.goal_still_saving: The savings goal «{goal_name}» is still in status Saving.

tab_ui.bitte_eine_echte_kategorie: Please select a real category (not just the type header).
tab_ui.bitte_nur_kategorien_auswaehlen: Please select only categories (not the type headers).

account.hier_kannst_du_deinen: Here you can change your display name.
account.sicherheitsstufe_konnte_nicht_geaendert: Security level could not be changed.
account.jeder_mit_zugriff_auf: ⚠️ Anyone with access to your files can open the data!
account.pin_oder_restorekey_verlieren: ⚠️ PIN oder Restore-Key verlieren = Datenbank unwiederbringlich verloren!
account.passwort_oder_restorekey_verlieren: ⚠️ Passwort oder Restore-Key verlieren = Datenbank unwiederbringlich verloren!
account.schuetzt_vor_versehenneugier_nicht: 💡 Protects against mistakes/curiosity — not safe if USB is lost.
account.password_min_length: Password must be at least 4 characters long.

backup.emergency_tooltip:
Deletes ALL data and restarts the app. Works even without a password.
A backup will be created first (if possible).
backup.title: Backup & Restore
backup.cleanup_intro:
There are {count} backups stored (limit: {keep}). Please select which {excess} backup(s) to delete.

The oldest are pre-selected.
backup.restore_now_text: Would you like to restore the imported backup as the active database now?
backup.restore_key_text:
This backup cannot be opened with the current user key.

Please enter the recovery code (restore key) that was shown at the time.

suggestion.suggestion_surplus: {typ} – {cat}: For {n} months averaging {amount} under budget. Suggestion: Reduce budget from {current} to {suggested}.
suggestion.suggestion_deficit: {typ} – {cat}: For {n} months averaging {amount} over budget. Suggestion: Increase budget from {current} to {suggested}.
suggestion.chronic_text: These categories should definitely be adjusted.

settings_ui.backup_keep_tooltip:
How many auto backups should be kept at most.
Older auto backups are deleted automatically.
settings_ui.enc_info:
🔒 Your database is encrypted.
Path and database are managed via account management.

update.hint_staging: Note: 'Check & download' downloads an update and places it in 'updates/staging/'.

dbmgmt.cleanup_confirm_body:
Do you want to clean up the database?

This removes:
• Orphaned budget entries
• Broken system categories (BUDGET BALANCE)
• Invalid tags
• Entries with invalid data

{extra}
dbmgmt.reset_warning_body:
WARNING: This action deletes {reset_type}!

Do you really want to continue?

{backup_line}{tracking_line}{extra}
dbmgmt.last_warning_body: You are about to delete ALL DATA! Are you ABSOLUTELY SURE?
dbmgmt.reset_success_body:
{message}

The database has been reset.
Default categories were created.

Please restart the application.

backup_restore.auto_backup_notice:
An automatic backup will be created.

{extra}

search.navigate_hint: Switch to the {tab} tab for details.

startup.welcome_desc: Create a new user or import existing data from a backup (.bmr / .enc / .db).
startup.import_success:
Data imported successfully.

The app will now start with your new user.
startup.restore_key_prompt:
This backup is encrypted and likely from a different account.

Please enter the restore key.
startup.name_step_desc: What should your account be called? Enter your name or a nickname.
startup.choice_step_desc: Do you want to create a new account or restore data from a backup?
startup.security_step_desc: Choose how your account should be protected.

create_user.title: 👤 New User
create_user.first_user_info: Welcome! Create your user account to get started.
create_user.quick_tooltip:
Quick access without entering a password.
Encryption with locally stored key.
Protects against accidents — not against USB theft.
create_user.pin_tooltip:
Quick protection with a short PIN.
Losing PIN/Restore-Key = data permanently lost!
create_user.pw_tooltip:
Maximum protection with a password.
Losing password/Restore-Key = data permanently lost!
